data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Design ensures that interfaces are visually appealing and easy to navigate.
data.technical_spec: Consistent color schemes, simple icons, and clear typography.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimized decision complexity where users can easily choose options.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menus, quick-access buttons, and predictive text.

data.title: Law of Progressive Disclosure
data.description: Information is provided when necessary to reduce cognitive load.
data.technical_spec: Expandable options and settings menus that reveal further details upon selection.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design elements are positioned for easy interaction and reach.
data.technical_spec: Large, tappable areas for touch screens and easily clickable links.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users' expectations are met because WhatsApp behaves like similar platforms in its ecosystem.
data.technical_spec: Conventional interface layout, gesture support identical to OS standards.
